Timeline

Release Date

December 12th 2024

Overview

“
Make new friends, explore the sights, move into your dream home, and start building your lifestyle in LEGO® Fortnite Brick Life! It’s an all-new social roleplay experience in the LEGO Fortnite world!
”
— Blog Post Description[1]

LEGO® Fortnite Brick Life is a social roleplay game within Fortnite that released on December 12th 2024.

Gameplay and Features

Gameplay and Features[]

Place your home

Progress is saved as you play! Just re-place your home anywhere to continue where you left off. Ready to move in? Use the glowing For Sale Sign at an empty lot to make it yours.

Check the Task Board at Harmonious Hall

Requests for help are flooding into the NEW Brick Bay Task Board! Squawk on over to Harmonious Hall and check it out!

Find a job

To start earning money, find a job. Currently there is 20 different jobs available all around the map.

  • Academy Professor
  • Academy Student
  • Banker
  • Bobom Milk Tea Bobarista
  • Cat Cafe Barista
  • Cinema Usher
  • Courier
  • Durrr Burger Line Cook
  • Fortune Teller
  • Personal Trainer
  • Scoundrel
  • Security Officer
  • Stable Hand
  • Sushi Chef
  • Tour Guide
  • Rooftop DJ (Added in Update v33.11)
  • Dim Sum Chef (Added in Update v33.20)
  • Gardener (Added in Update v34.00)
  • Angler (Added in Update v34.40)
  • Star Wars Fan (During Galactic Battle)
  • Cantina Cook (During Galactic Battle)
  • Bestie Fest Helper (During Bestie Fest)
  • Simpsons Family Friend (During Chapter 6: Mini Season 2)
Trending Jobs

Every few minutes 2 or 3 different Jobs get a Trending Job label. The amount of cash rewarded by them is increased by 25%.

Minigames

Every day at 5 PM a new Activity will appear. Currently there are 3 different activities.

  • Racing - Race around the Brick Bay area. Fastest one wins.
  • Vampire Experiment (Added in Update v33.30) -
  • Litter Boxing (Added in Update v33.30) - Boxing match between players. Last one standing in the ring wins.
  • Lightsaber Duel (During Galactic Battle) - Similar to Litter Boxing but with Lightsabers.
  • Llama Scavenger Hunt (During Galactic Battle) - Find 4 Llama pieces for a prize.
Secret Rooms
“
The Vault has opened. Approach if you dare.
”
— Scoundrel
  • Vault in Vaulted Value Propositions - It can be opened by using the Golden Keycard. The keycard can be found in Midas' Office on the top floor. (Nearby Security System has to be hacked; doesn't work anymore.)
“
There's a cool secret at Bobom Milk Tea... and one of you has found it!! Well done!
”
— Helsie
  • Secret High Stakes Club Hideout - It can be opened by bringing Lil' Louie to the storage room in Bobom Milk Tea. Lil' Louie can be found in Mourndale Academy on the 3rd floor.

Houses[]

Note: Only base game houses are included. More can be unlocked by buying Builds in the Item Shop or by unlocking them in various LEGO® Passes.

Jobs[]

Warning: Jobs will not award money if you're at the money limit, which is currently 200,000.

  • Academy Professor
  • Academy Student
  • Banker
  • Bobom Milk Tea Bobarista
  • Cat Cafe Barista
  • Cinema Usher
  • Rooftop DJ
  • Courier
  • Dim Sum Chef
  • Durrr Burger Line Cook

Academy Professor
“
Your presence is requested in the Headmaster's office, immediately.
”
— Raven

To become an Academy Professor, you need to get hired by Raven at the Mourndale Academy. He can be found on the top floor, in the Headmaster's office.

Tasks[]

UTC

Turns out "students these days" actually DO know a thing or two!
Mark a student's Homework
+500 Cash
0 / 1

UTC

This is your moment, all eyes on you. Time to share your wisdom!
Teach a lesson at a Podium or Blackboard
+500 Cash
0 / 1

UTC

Strict or lenient, that's up to you, but the students should know the rules.
Give a Hall Pass or a Detention Slip
+500 Cash
0 / 1

Academy Student
“
Hey! I could use your help with some classwork, if you're around.
”
— Isabelle

To become an Academy Student, you need to get hired by Isabelle at the Mourndale Academy. She can be found on the bottom floor, in the classroom.

UTC

+500 Cash

Valentine's Event 2025[]

Valentine's Event 2025

Available from January 31st 2025 to February 21st 2025.

UTC

Everyone loves flowers!
Give flowers to someone or place them on a counter
Cupid's Surprise
0 / 2

UTC

Nothing says "you're special to me," like those actual, literal words written out on paper.
Give a Valentine to someone or place it in a Parcel Locker
Cupid's Surprise
0 / 2

UTC

These artisinal Heart Wands are made by craftspeople in central Italy. They're imbued with the ancient powers of love, friendship, and adorability.
Use a Heart Wand in 3 different businesses
Cupid's Surprise

News Tab

News Tab[]

  • In-Game

Image Description Date
Coming December 12
Gather your friends and explore the bustling Brick Bay city in LEGO Brick Life December 12. 		December 10th 2024
LEGO Fortnite Brick Life
A new social sim experience in LEGO Fortnite universe! As you explore the bustling Brick Bay city alongside up to 31 other players. Hang out with friends, explore the sights, help out the city and move into your dream home. 		December 12th 2024
Check Your Phone
Access Jobs, Vehicles, Furniture and more....all from your LEGO phone in LEGO Fortnite Brick Life. 		December 12th 2024
Get a Job
A job is the perfect way to earn a living! Whatever you fancy, there's a profession for everyone in Brick Bay. Here are just a few roles you can take:
  • Courier - Deliver parcels to other Brick Bay residents!
  • Security Officer - Make sure crime doesn't pay.
  • Scoundrel - Make sure crime does pay.
  • Sushi Chef - Serving up the tastiest fish in Brick Bay!
  • Bubble Tea Server - Serving Brick Bay's most refreshing beverage.
  • Fortune Teller - What does your future hold? New furniture!
 December 12th 2024
Purchase a Home
Once you've arrived in Brick Bay, you can find an empty lot in your desired location, purchase your very own home, and customize it to your heart's content! Use the Furniture Catalog on your phone or visit the Furniture Shop to personalize your own space. 		December 12th 2024
Vehicles
Once you've earned enough by doing some odd-jobs, open your Phone and shop the hottest forms of transportation from hover boards to cars! 		December 12th 2024
Sightseeing
Visit a variety of locations in Brick Bay, each with its unique personality, jobs to try out, landmarks to admire, and so much more. 		December 12th 2024
Role Play
There are many ways to play LEGO Fortnite Brick Life! Act out a role for your minifig by giving it a fun persona, job, and home. The possibilities are endless. 		December 12th 2024
Morning and Night
Experience Brick Bay in the morning and night. 		December 12th 2024
Text Chat
Get social and post messages in text chat for nearby players to see. 		December 12th 2024
Headline a Concert
Head down to the beach and throw a concert using Jam Loops with friends! 		December 12th 2024
Winterfest in Brick Bay
Winterfest is here. Explore the fresh snow in Brick Bay and create snowballs from snow piles to start some winter antics! 		December 21st 2024
Lunar New Year
Brick Bay is celebrating the Lunar New Year! Earn Red Envelopes by completing Trending Job tasks, or work at the newly opened Dim Sum Restaurant. Red Envelopes contain Currency and an unlock of 1 of the 8 LNY decor items. 		January 15th 2025
The Golden Cart Open Now
Bao Bros is looking to hire at The Golden Cart, a newly opened Restaurant. Complete Job Tasks to earn Lunar New Year rewards. 		January 15th 2025
More Activities
Every day at 5 PM a new Activity will appear. You can race the competition with Drift. Convert students to Vampires in The Vampire Experiment Minigame. Box your opponent out of the ring and into the sand in Litter Boxing. 		January 31st 2025
Brick Bay Valentine's Day
Brick Bay is blooming with hearts and flowers. Talk to Sunflower at the Flower Stand to receive Valentine's Day tasks. Hand out Valentine's Day items to Brick Bay Residents or spread the love with the Heart Wand and unlock a furniture reward. 		January 31st 2025
Soccer in Brick Bay
Stop by the pitch when the soccer minigame is active to score solo or with friends. Score goals to earn credits based on points earned. 		March 12th 2025
Supernova Academy Celebration
Gather your friends in Brick Life's Town Centre for a community celebration of heroes. 		June 7th 2025

Updates

Updates[]

Update v33.10

December 12th 2024

  • Brick Life was released.

Update v33.11

December 18th 2024

  • Funk Ops' Party Perch is now open.
    • Funk Ops and DJ Yonder spawn inside.
  • Winterfest Event has started.
    • The map is covered in snow.
    • A small area with decorations was added.

Update v33.20

January 14th 2025

  • Winterfest Event has ended.
    • Small area with decorations was removed but the snow remains.
  • Year of the Snake Event has started.
    • Each NPC now gives a Red Envelope after finishing a quest.
    • Red Envelope gives a player a random amount of Cash ranging from 50 to 200 and Lunar New Year-themed furniture.
    • Available Lunar New Year-themed furniture:
      • Red Envelope Display
      • Just Being Koi Scroll
      • Luckier Envelope Tree
      • Lunar New Year Oblong Table
      • 2025 Banner
      • Lunar New Year Square Table
      • Year of the Snake Statue
  • The Golden Cart was added.
    • Bao Bros and Killian spawn inside.
  • Wheels 'n Deals is now named on the map.

Update v33.30

January 31st 2025

  • Year of the Snake Event has ended.
  • The map is no longer covered in snow.
  • 2 new minigames were added:
    • Vampire Experiment
    • Litter Boxing
  • Valentine's Day Event has started.
    • Sunflower's Garden Stand was added nearby the lake.
      • Sunflower spawns near it.
    • Sunflower gives Cupid's Surprise after finishing a quest.
    • Cupid's Surprise gives a player Box of Chocolates Deco or a Rose item.

Update v34.00

February 21st 2025

  • Valentine's Day Event has ended.
  • Weather was added.
  • 3 public gardens were added.

Update v34.10

March 11th 2025

  • Holographic logos appeared above most of the job buildings in Downtown Brick Bay.
  • One of the gardens was turned into a Soccer Field.
  • Players now spawn in front of vacant lots.

Update v34.20

March 25th 2025

  • Task Boards were added. They replaced resident quests.
    • They can be found near the Harmonious Hall.

Update v34.30

April 8th 2025

  • The Pier was updated for the upcoming Bait Shop.

Update v34.40

April 22nd 2025

  • Durrr Burger Line Cook and Sushi Chef careers were revamped and expanded.
    • They are one of the first careers to have a "Level Up" function.
      • Leveling up rewards players with credits and furniture.
  • Added a new Angler career.
  • Added Fishing.

Update v35.00

May 2nd 2025

  • The map was completly changed for the Star Wars Event.

Update v36.00

June 7th 2025

  • The Star Wars Event has ended.
  • A Dark Side Lightsaber stand prop was added.
  • Central Plaza was updated with Supernova Academy props.
  • Spires can be found all over the map.
  • Added 2 AI powered NPCs: Noir and Slurp Leviathan.
    • They got disabled few days later.

Update v36.20

July 15th 2025

  • Added more lots.
    • Mostly in the frozen waterfall area.
  • Added new XL Lots.
  • Vehicles can now spawn in parking lots around the map.

July 17th 2025

  • Enabled the new XL Victorian Mansion. It can be bought for 200K currency.
    • It is the most expensive thing in this mode.

Update v36.30

July 29th 2025

  • The Bestie Fest event has started.
  • Dim Sum Chef, Stable Hand, Bobom Milk Tea Bobarista, Cafe Cat Barista careers were expanded.

Update v37.00

August 7th 2025

  • All spires disappeared.

Update v37.10

August 26th 2025

  • The Bestie Fest event has ended.

Update v37.40

October 2nd 2025

  • Food & Fish Collection Books were added.

Update v37.50

October 9th 2025

  • Potions Collection Book was added.
  • A strange green rift appears in the sky from time to time.

Update v38.00

November 1st 2025

  • The map was changed for the Simpsons Event.

Update v38.10

November 11th 2025

  • One of the lakes became radioactive.
Trivia

Trivia[]

  • The codename for this game mode is "Sprout".
